statement: In every magma, Equation 792 (`x = y * (z * ((w * x) * y))`) implies Equation 3671 (`x * x = (x * y) * (z * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0761
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op w x) y)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op (op x y) (op z y))
